settings.heading: The science behind raft-forming reflux relief.
settings.subheading: Mellow is built around alginate raft technology — a mechanical approach designed to help reduce reflux by forming a floating barrier in the stomach.
settings.footnote: Based on published studies of alginate raft-forming formulations.

settings.heading: Three steps. Hours of relief.
settings.subheading: Mellow activates in the stomach to form a floating raft where reflux starts.
settings.step_text_1: One pouch. No water. No mixing. No chalky aftertaste.
settings.step_text_2: MellowRaft™ forms a floating gel barrier at the top of your stomach.
settings.step_text_3: The raft holds where reflux starts, helping keep acid down for hours.
